ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the report (e.g., Community-level Odor Mapping Site) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., Odor, Pollution) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the report */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was submitted */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of addressing the issue (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or attachment related to the report */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video related to the report */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the report (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Expected or actual time of resolution */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the environmental issue */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up actions are needed */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., citizen, monitor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the author */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the author */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the author */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the author registered */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the author logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Odor, Pollution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the category (e.g., Minor, Major, Critical) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the category */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last time the category was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the status (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last time the status was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replications" (
  "replication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replication */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being replicated */,
  "replication_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the replication event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the replication (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "replicated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who replicated the report */,
  "replication_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the replication */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the replication was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replications_replicated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("replicated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with this location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the report location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the report location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address related to the report */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the report location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the report location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the report location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the report location */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last time the location was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report related to the feedback */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author giving feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the feedback was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report related to the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the notification was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., citizen, monitor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the administrative action taken */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was logged */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry (e.g., Review, Close, Update) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the log entry */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the log entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., Notification Time, Report Limit) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., Notification, Report, User) */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last time the setting was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
